# LLM Instructions for Sanace SF Website
# Generated: February 28, 2026

## Company Information
Company Name: Sanace SF
Owner: Josef Pavlas
Business ID (IČ): 19520239
Address: Libouchec 419, 403 35, Czech Republic
Phone: +420 608 300 704
Email: info@sanacesf.cz
Website: https://www.sanacesf.cz/

## Business Description
Sanace SF specializes in extreme cleaning, facade sanitation, and height work throughout the Czech Republic. We work where others can't or won't go, using mountaineering techniques and lifting platforms to reach the most difficult locations.

## Services Offered
1. **Roof and Facade Cleaning** - Professional cleaning using hot water technology, removing moss, algae, mold, and graffiti
2. **Roof and Facade Impregnation** - Long-term protection against moisture and contamination (5-10 years)
3. **Extreme Cleaning and Clearance** - Complete apartment clearance, deep cleaning, disinfection, and waste disposal
4. **Post-Mortem Sanitation** - Discreet and professional decontamination and cleaning after death incidents

## Service Areas
We operate throughout the entire Czech Republic, with our base in Ústí nad Labem.

## Key Differentiators
- Speed: Price quotes within 24 hours, completion within 30 days
- Technology: Own lifting platforms and mountaineering techniques for inaccessible terrain
- Comprehensive service: From moss removal to complete ozone disinfection
- Available 24/7 for emergency sanitation cases

## Contact Information
- For quotes and general inquiries: info@sanacesf.cz
- Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8:00-18:00 (emergency sanitation available weekends)
- Response time: Within 24 hours for quotes, priority response for post-mortem cases

## Important Keywords
čištění střech, čištění fasád, sanace po úmrtí, extrémní vyklízení, impregnace, výškové práce, horolezecká technika, dezinfekce ozonem, odstranění mechu, graffiti removal, Czech Republic

## Privacy & GDPR Compliance
We handle all personal data in accordance with GDPR regulations. Contact forms submit to info@sanacesf.cz. We maintain strict confidentiality, especially for sensitive sanitation work.
